name: Lobaby
description: An ultra-premium next-generation decentralized AI-powered token protocol built on enterprise-grade blockchain infrastructure, setting a new benchmark for technological innovation and intelligent value ecology. All locked funds and token reserves have been completely donated by the development team with zero private reservation, zero team holdings, and zero centralized control—achieving full on-chain decentralization and true community autonomy. Every transaction automatically triggers a 2% deflationary burn mechanism, permanently reducing total supply and strengthening long-term scarcity through immutable smart contract logic. As the baby derivative of Lobster Coin and the next-gen AI evolution of Lobster AI, Lobaby represents the most advanced, powerful, and revolutionary AI-driven blockchain iteration in the ecosystem—the strongest successor and future core of the Lobster family, leading the next wave of intelligent blockchain evolution.
